description: Standing-pools table shown to user BEFORE the interactive prompt. User can see available pools before deciding.
assertion: table_shown is true; prompt_shown_yet is false (table precedes prompt)

description: After table, user is prompted with verbatim text. User responds 'review-pool'.

state.prompt_text: Which pool would you like to stop? Enter pool name or 'cancel' to abort:

description: SendMessage type:shutdown dispatched to Pool Lead of 'review-pool'.
assertion: message_type is 'shutdown'; sent to Pool Lead of review-pool

description: Stop confirmed. Pool stopped cleanly. pre_prompt_table_shown records that table was displayed before prompt.
